name: Season Ticket Resale
description: NFL/NBA/NHL/MLB season ticket ROI analysis and automation. Track buy prices, sell prices, and profit/loss across all major sports leagues.

name: Deal Scanner
description: Automated mispriced ticket detection running every 20 minutes. Sends alerts via Telegram and email when deals are found.

name: Ticket Flip Tracker
description: Track individual ticket flips — buy price, sell price, profit/loss. Multi-platform listing across StubHub, Vivid Seats, and SeatGeek.

name: NCAA Bracket App
description: Live scoring bracket app for the friend group. Real-time updates, leaderboard, and trash talk features for the 2026 tournament.

name: Mission Control Dashboard
description: Central command center for managing all projects, tasks, agents, and automations. The app you're looking at right now.
